name: com.unity.xr.androidxr-openxr
description: Enables you to build mixed reality apps for Android XR devices by implementing support for Android XR extensions.

_upm.changelog:
### Added
- Added support for Composition Layers Passthrough Splash Screen (requires Composition Layers version 2.3.0+)

### Changed
- Changed the project validation rules to no longer show an extraneous validation warning regarding an upcoming feature.
- Updated ARF package dependency to 6.4.0

### Fixed
- Fixed the Foveated Rendering feature preventing Unity projects using it from appearing on the Play
  Store for devices without eye tracking - it uses the Eye Tracking permission for ETFR but
  gracefully degrades to FFR without permissions or hardware support.
